description: AI cross-checked sector classifications. Each entry is a company whose initial keyword-based classification was General AI; a Claude-in-Chrome session visited the website and assigned a more specific sector based on actual content. Layered on top of data/startups.csv.

Freeport Markets.note: Investing platform: pre-IPO tokens, tokenized stocks, AI-curated signal extraction from social feeds.

Primer.note: Automated personalized product demos for sales teams.

Thesis.note: Autonomous platform to run ML experiments, train models, and iterate on frontier research.

Rovr.note: AI orchestration layer for FDE, IT consulting, and professional services teams.

Redapto.note: Frontier intelligence platform for GTM teams with orchestration and runbooks.

Nessie.note: Syncs AI conversations across tools and turns them into reusable, shareable contexts.

Soren.note: Horizontal private AI deployment services for regulated industries; no single vertical.

Mixy.note: Consumer app for making music mashups without DJ skills.

RowFlow.note: Converts forms into conversational AI intake across SMS, WhatsApp, email, Slack.

TectoAI.note: AI governance, PII redaction, and compliance monitoring for regulated industries.

Humoniq.note: Voice AI contact center / BPO for airlines, OTAs, and travel industry support.

Doe.note: Agent that acts across user's tools to research, automate, and handle cross-domain work.

Meteor.note: AI-native browser with a state-of-the-art browser agent.

Prox.note: AI agents for proactive customer support across inbox/ticket queues.

Sennu AI.note: Enterprise implementation services firm rolling out Claude Code across customer orgs; cross-functional, not vertical.
